To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Bachelor of Arts (BA) in Fine Arts Experience 3 to 5 years The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s): Group of Companies Additional Requirements Minimum 3 years of professional design experience in a creative agency or fast-paced corporate environment. The "Design-First" Mindset: A degree in Fine Arts or Graphic Design is a plus, but your portfolio is your true resume. We want to see a deep understanding of layout, typography, and color theory. AI Proficiency: You must be comfortable integrating AI into your workflow to speed up production and explore new creative styles. Print Specialist: Expert knowledge of bleed, margins, CMYK vs. RGB, and paper stock specifications for high-quality communication materials. Software Stack: Expert: Adobe Creative Suite (specifically Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign). Intermediate: Figma/Canva for digital collaboration. AI Tools: Midjourney, Magnific, or similar. The Ideal Candidate: You follow design accounts on Behance/Dribbble and know what's "in" right now. You don't just "generate" images; you direct them. You are detail-oriented enough to catch a 1pt alignment error in a 50-page print document. Responsibilities & Context We are searching for a Senior Visualizer (Sr. Executive/Asst. Manager) with a "future-forward" mindset. You’ll be our lead visual storyteller, blending classic design principles with the efficiency of AI. Whether it’s a high-end coffee table brochure or a viral digital campaign, you know how to make it look premium, trendy, and cohesive. What You’ll Be Doing: AI-Enhanced Ideation: Use Generative AI (Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, DALL-E) to storyboard, conceptualize, and produce high-fidelity visuals at scale. Print & Production: Design high-impact communication materials, including corporate brochures, annual reports, event branding, and large-format print media. Brand Evolution: Maintain and evolve our visual identity across all touchpoints, ensuring we remain at the forefront of design trends. Hybrid Workflows: Take raw AI outputs and refine them using Photoshop and Illustrator into professional, brand-compliant assets. End-to-End Execution: Manage projects from the initial "mood board" phase through to the final print-ready files (pre-press). Skills & Expertise Suggested by Storyboarding Figma Canva Adobe Creative Suite Typography Compensation & Other Benefits

QMS - OFFICER/EXECUTIVE Application Deadline : 09 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Dhaka (Savar) Salary: Negotiable Published: 07 Feb 2026 To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Experience Responsibilities & Context Communicating and Establish quality management system in the factory Store to Shipment (Cutting, Sewing, Washing & Finishing) Develop Quality Strategies, policies, processes, standards and systems of the company. Follow up, monitor & supervise QMS requirements. Prepare, Update and Monitor SOP’s and ensure all the operations are performing through SOP. Ensure compliance with ISO standards, regulatory requirements, and customer requirements Plan, conduct, and manage internal technical audits and support external technical audits Identify non-conformities and lead corrective and preventive actions (CAPA) Monitor quality performance indicators and report and share results to all the concern department Lead continuous improvement initiatives and risk-based thinking. Train employees on QMS procedures and quality awareness. Act as the main contact for certification bodies and regulatory authorities. Support supplier quality management and evaluations. Develop & implement procedures for inspecting, testing & evaluating the quality of products in accordance with the company’s standards. Train up Quality Inspectors & staffs to develop knowledge on basic quality requirements, customer standard & all over the quality policies & procedures. Ensure product safety (Needle control, Metal detector Machine, Pinch setting, Sharp object control, Fusing, Label print, Machine calibration) Create training schedule and arrange training program according to training program. Follow-up and support Buyer technical & factory internal audit in every aspect. Follow-up Occupational Health & Safety Management System internal audit every month on ISO 45001:2018 Standard Create monthly and yearly internal audit schedule. Secure all technical audit findings and Prepared CAP against Internal/Buyer audit (Product audit, Process audit, trail audit, QS audit, technical audit). DHU and top3 defects analysis along with Root cause and CAP analyze as per buyer requirements. Monthly internal audit report along with root cause and CAP send to concern buyers Yearly Quality objective Review for all departments. Coordinate regularly with the Bangladesh recruitment team to stay updated on candidate availability and recruitment progress. Maintain professional communication through email, calls, and online meetings using fluent spoken English. Develop marketing and branding ideas to increase company visibility in the manpower market. Prepare business proposals, presentations, and reports for management. Conduct market research to identify new business opportunities and monitor competitor activities. Ensure high client satisfaction through timely update

Responsibilities & Context Accounts & Order Processing will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, managing sales orders, ensuring proper accounting entries, and supporting day-to-day accounts operations using Tally software and manual registers. The role requires strong analytical skills, compliance with financial regulations, and effective coordination with vendors, suppliers, and internal stakeholders. Process sales orders accurately using Tally software. Record and manage sales collections in Tally software. Enter purchase transactions on a daily basis in Tally software. Verify and review bills and vouchers before processing vendor payments and posting entries into Tally. Verify, allocate, post, and reconcile accounts payable and receivable. Maintain the general ledger and assist with month-end closing activities. Ensure all financial transactions are properly recorded, classified, and documented to support preparation of financial statements. Develop and maintain a centralized accounting system for effective account management. Reconcile vendor accounts and resolve discrepancies in a timely manner. Prepare financial documents including bills, invoices, pay-orders, purchase orders, payables, and receivables. Coordinate and manage payment and billing details with suppliers, vendors, and external service providers. Prepare monthly bank reconciliation statements. Perform monthly stock reconciliation using Tally software. Maintain and preserve accounting documents and records systematically. Carry out any other duties and responsibilities assigned by management from time to time. job_description: Engineer / Senior Engineer - Liaison & Regulatory Affairs : Intraco Group Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Intraco Group Engineer / Senior Engineer - Liaison & Regulatory Affairs Application Deadline : 09 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 3 Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 08 Feb 2026 To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements 5 to 10 years of proven experience in real estate project liaison, coordination, or approval management. Must have hands-on experience dealing with RAJUK, CDA, CoxDA, and other development authorities in Bangladesh. Prior experience in hotel/resort or large-scale real estate projects will be an added advantage. Excellent communication and negotiation skills with regulatory bodies.Strong understanding of building codes, approval processes, and government procedures.Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines. Proficiency in MS Office and basic knowledge of AutoCAD preferred. Willingness to travel frequently across project locations. Job Location: Dhaka (with frequent visits to project sites at Chattogram, Cox’s Bazar, Comilla, and Tangail) Both male and female candidates are encouraged to apply. Responsibilities & Context Intraco Properties Limited , a concern of Intraco Group , is a growing real estate and infrastructure development company in Bangladesh. The company is engaged in developing residential, commercial, and hospitality projects in Dhaka, Chattogram, Cox’s Bazar, Tangail, and other key locations. To support our upcoming projects and ensure efficient coordination with design consultants and regulatory authorities, we are looking for a dynamic and experienced professional to join our team. Job Context The selected candidate will play a vital role in managing liaison and coordination activities with external architects, engineers, and government authorities to ensure timely approvals and smooth project execution. This position reports directly to the Chief Operating Officer (COO) . Key Responsibilities Maintain close liaison with external architects, structural engineers, MEP engineers, and BOQ engineers for project design and documentation. Coordinate with RAJUK, CDA, Cox’s Bazar Development Authority (CoxDA) , and other regulatory bodies for necessary project approvals, permits, and renewals . Follow up on land, design, and construction approvals at both government and local authority levels (Dhaka, Chattogram, Cox’s Bazar, Comilla, Tangail). Prepare and submit project-related applications, documents, and compliance reports to relevant authorities. Assist in reviewing drawings and project plans before submission for approval. Maintain effective communication with consultants and contractors to ensure alignment with regulatory requirements.

টিএ, ডিএ প্রদান করা হবে। সংস্থার নীতিমালা অনুযায়ী স্টাফ কন্ট্রিবিউটরী প্রভিডেন্ট ফান্ড, গ্রাচুইটি, বার্ষিক ইনক্রিমেন্ট, উৎসব ভাতা, বৈশাখী ভাতা (মূল বেতনের ৩০%) প্রদান করা হবে। সিটি ভাতা মূল বেতনের উল্লেখিত হারে প্রাপ্ত হবে ঢাকা, ময়মনসিংহ ও গাজীপুর সিটি কর্পোরেশন এলাকায় ৪০%, নোয়াখালী, কুমিল্লা, ফেনী, লক্ষ্মীপুর ও চট্টগ্রাম জেলার সকল শাখা ৩০% এবং রাজশাহী, খুলনা সিটি কর্পোরেশন এলাকায় ২০%। কর্মস্থলে আবাসন সুবিধা, চিকিৎসা তহবিল ও স্টাফ কল্যান তহবিল হতে আর্থিক সুবিধা প্রদান করা হবে। আবাসন ঋণ, প্রভিডেন্ট ফান্ড ঋণ, মটরসাইকেল ও কম্পিউটার ঋণ সুবিধা আছে। সংস্থায় কর্মরত স্টাফদের মেধাবী সন্তানদের শিক্ষা বৃত্তির সুযোগ আছে। সকল পদে যোগ্যতার ভিত্তিতে পদোন্নতির সুযোগ রয়েছে এবং কাজের গুনগত ও সংখ্যাগত অর্জনের ভিত্তিতে ইনসেন্টিভ প্রদান করা হবে। বাৎসরিক মোটরসাইকেল মেরামত বিল প্রদান করা হবে। Senior Executive/Assistant Manager – Documentation : SSL Wireless Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List SSL Wireless Senior Executive/Assistant Manager – Documentation Application Deadline : 09 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 24 Feb 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Responsibilities & Context We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced Documentation Professional to manage end-to-end documentation activities supporting our ICT projects, business development initiatives, and government/private sector submissions. This role requires strong ownership, the ability to work independently under pressure, and hands-on experience in preparing and managing Tender, RFP, RFQ, and eGP submissions within strict deadlines. The ideal candidate will play a critical role in ensuring documentation quality, compliance, and timely delivery in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. What You Will Do: The incumbent will be responsible for independently managing end-to-end Tender, RFP, RFQ, and eGP submissions, including document preparation, compliance verification, coordination with internal stakeholders, and ensuring timely and accurate final submission under strict deadlines. The role requires close collaboration with technical, commercial, finance, legal, and operations teams to collect necessary inputs, clarify requirements, and ensure all tender and proposal documents fully meet submission criteria. The position involves preparing, reviewing, and maintaining high-quality business and technical documentation such as proposals, compliance matrices, reports, manuals, process documentation, workflow diagrams, and presentations, ensuring accuracy, clarity, consistency, and alignment with organizational standards. The candidate will be responsible for maintaining proper version control, documentation repositories, and submission records to ensure traceability, audit readiness, and ease of future reference. The role includes reviewing documentation for completeness, quality, and compliance with tender, client, and regulatory requirements, while supporting continuous improvement of documentation templates, processes, and best practices. The incumbent will actively utilize AI-assisted tools to optimize documentation workflows, including drafting, structuring, summarization, and template automation, while supporting digitalization initiatives and process efficiency improvements. The position demands the ability to manage multiple documentation assignments simultaneously, work effectively under pressure, and support urgent or last-minute submissions while maintaining a high standard of accuracy and professionalism. Project Manager : SKS Foundation Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List SKS Foundation Project Manager Application Deadline : 09 Mar 2026 Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Age: 18 to 50 years Location: Gaibandha Salary: Tk. 70000 - 70000 (Monthly) Published: 02 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 18 to 50 years Relevant working experience with PKSF or any project funded by multi-lateral development partners would be preferred. Good computer knowledge (MS office suite, typing both English and Bangla). Training in project management/ Entrepreneurship development will be treated as advantage. Responsibilities & Context Job Context SKS Foundation is going to implement a sub-project titled “Promoting resilient green growth in dairy sub-sector through ensuring RECP” ’as a part of the ‘Sustainable Microenterprise and Resilient Transformation (SMART)’ project. This sub-project aims to increase resource-efficient and resilient green growth of microenterprises (MEs) under “Cattle and Buffalo” sub-sector. The project is jointly financed by the World Bank, Palli Karma-Sahayak Foundation (PKSF), and SKS Foundation. The Objectives of the project is: To adopt resource efficient, cleaner production and good farming practices. To adopt climate resilient technologies. To promote circular economy. To increase technical knowledge and capacity of the MEs. To assist entrepreneurs in expanding the market for dairy products. Responsibilities: The ‘Project Manager’ is responsible for overall implementation, supervision and monitoring of the project at the field. His/her duties and responsibilities, which are essential but not limited to: Coordinate project management activities, resources, equipment, and information. Provide strategic direction for project implementation and supervise the project. Identify and mitigate project risks and issues to ensure successful project delivery. Facilitate project meetings, training, and workshops, and Environment Club meetings Manage project budgets, procurement, reimbursement, as well as track project performance. Ensure and supervise documentation on events, program learnings and impact, case studies, and reports. Ensure and supervise preparation and submission of project progress reports in a timely manner (monthly, quarterly, yearly). Maintain regular communication and collaboration with PKSF regarding sub-project implementation. Maintain liaison and coordination with local government as well as govt. offices such as DAE, DoF, and DoE. Report to senior management regarding project progress regularly. Any other tasks or duties assigned by the senior management of the SKS Foundation. Compensation & Other Benefits Weekly 2 holidays,Mobile bill,T/A Salary Review: Yearly Festi

Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 25 to 32 years Responsibilities & Context প্রতি মাসে পূর্বের মাসের কর্মীদের হাজিরা চেক করা জন্য সহযোগিতা করা। প্রতি মাসে সকল কর্মীদের ওভারটাইমশিট প্রস্তুত করার জন্য সহযোগিতা করা। কর্মী নিয়োগের জন্য প্রধান কাযার্লয়ের মাধ্যমে ইন্টারভিউর আয়োজন করা। নতুন কর্মীদের যোগদানপত্রের সকল কাগজপত্র তৈরী করে প্রধান কার্যালয়ে প্রেরণের ব্যবস্থা গ্রহণ করা । অব্যহতি/পদত্যাগ কর্মীর সকল কাগজপত্র তৈরী করে প্রধান কার্যালয়ে প্রেরণ করা হয়। কর্মীদের অনিয়ম সংঘটিত কারণ দশার্নোর নোটিশ, পরামর্শপত্র ইত্যাদি প্রস্তত করা হয়। এইচ.আর. সংক্রান্ত সকল ফাইল, চিঠি এবং নীতিমালা ইত্যাদি সংরক্ষণ করা । যাতায়াত বিল পর্যবেক্ষণ ও শিট প্রস্তুত করা। সকল কর্মীদের স্বাস্থ্যবীমার সংক্রান্ত সকল কাগজপত্র তৈরী করে প্রধান কাযার্লয়ে প্রেরণ করা হয়। প্রশিক্ষণ ও মিটিং আয়োজনে সহযোগিতা করা। প্রতিদিন সকালে হাসপাতালের ও ফার্মেসী থেকে ক্যাশ টাকা গ্রহণ এবং নির্দিষ্ট সময়ের মধ্যে ব্যাংকিং কাজ সমাপ্ত করা। প্রতিদিন হাসপাতাল ও ফার্মেসীর পৃথক ভাবে ভাউচার, ক্যাশ ও ব্যাংক বুক, লেজারসহ সকল তথ্য সফটওয়্যারে আপডেট করার জন্য সহযোগিতা করা। যে কোন বিল প্রদানের পূর্বে নীতিমালা অনুযায়ী সকল প্রক্রিয়া সম্পন্ন করে ভ্যাট ও ট্যাক্স কর্তন করা ও সময়মত সরকারী কোষাগারে জমা প্রদান করা এবং তার কপি স্থানীয় ভ্যাট অফিসে জমা প্রদান করা। হিসাব বিভাগের লেনদেনের তথ্যাদি ও বিল ভাউচার, নোটিশ, এগ্রিমেন্ট ও প্রয়োজনীয় সকল ফাইল নিরাপদে সংরক্ষণ করা, আভ্যন্তরীন ও বহিঃ নিরিক্ষা কাজে প্রয়োজনীয় সহযোগীতা করা। সুপারভাইজার কে তথ্য প্রদান করা। হাসপাতালের যে কোনো মিটিং এবং ট্রেনিং এ অংশগ্রহণ করা। সুপারভাইজার এর আদেশক্রমে হাসপাতাল এর অন্য যেকোনো কাজে অংশ নেয়া এবং সাহায্য করা। Skills & Expertise Financial Analysis Microsoft Excel Suggested by Accounting Employee Attendance Employee Orientation Administration Compensation & Other Benefits Festival Bonus: 2 Workplace job_title: Production Center- In Charge, Bhasan Char, HCMP
job_description: Production Center- In Charge, Bhasan Char, HCMP : BRAC Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List BRAC Production Center- In Charge, Bhasan Char, HCMP Application Deadline : 09 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Noakhali (Hatiya) Salary: Negotiable Published: 04 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements KNOWLEDGE: BRAC’s values and mission, development sector, global development scenario to identify funding trends, financial and grants management, donor agencies, Livelihoods sector requirements, SKILLS: Budgeting, communication, researching, writing, monitoring and evaluating, preparing reports, auditing, analysing budgets, project management COMPETENCIES: Facilitating group meetings, managing timelines, oral and written fluency in both Bangla and English, handling critical issues with donor, project implementation Responsibilities & Context BRAC is an international development organisation founded in Bangladesh in 1972 that partners globally with over 100 million people living with inequality and poverty to create opportunities to realise their potential. Production Center- In charge mange the production center to run it toward self-sustain production-oriented center by planning, analysis, and established strategies and policies; this role focuses on identifying potential growth of Center and expanding income opportunities for economic benefit of the Rohingya community on Bhasan Char. Provide strategic leadership and operational management for the handicraft production center in Bhasan Char. Drive production, design the products and marketing initiatives to strengthen self-reliance and revenue generation. Lead and supervise the production team; ensure effective coordination with management, UNHCR, and key stakeholders. Maintain regular communication with potential buyers and manage strong relationships with supply chain vendors. Oversee order processing, inventory control, raw material sourcing, and ensure proper documentation (stock register, challan, ledger, cashbook, sales register). Prepare timely production, sales, and financial performance reports (monthly, quarterly, annual). Develop staff work plans and ensure efficient execution of production targets and operational activities. Assess and select training participants; coordinate with sewing zones and production units to integrate skilled FDMN women and girls. Monitor skill-development training, quality control, and market promotion activities. Manage incentive distribution for trainees and production laborers. Support capacity building for staff and ensure continuous improvement in facilitation, production skills, and business processes. Conduct cost–benefit analysis, monitor overall intervention performance, and ensure proper documentation
